edit_summary.goal: Fix the conditional_transition compile error by restructuring the analog block to use unconditional transition contributions with target variables, while also implementing the correct VCO phase integration behavior.
edit_summary.root_cause: The candidate module has a conditional transition contribution inside an analog block, which Spectre rejects, and it also fails to implement the required VCO phase integration behavior.

actions.description: Detach generated driven ports from source-fixed Spectre nodes using only strict preflight port-role diagnostics and public instance/module signatures.

edit_summary.goal: Reorder module port list to match public contract: inputs first (raw_level, vdd, vss), then output (clamped_level), so the fixed harness positional connection places clamped_level on an observable node rather than a supply.
edit_summary.root_cause: Module port order in Verilog-A header does not match the fixed Spectre harness positional instance order, causing a sourced-port voltage drive conflict on clamped_level->vdd.
